t.t-esc: message or 'Please provide a reason for rejection.'

div.style: position: fixed; top: 16px; right: 16px; z-index: 9999; max-width: 400px; box-shadow: var(--core-ui-shadow-lg);
position: fixed; top: 16px; right: 16px; z-index: 9999; max-width: 400px; box-shadow: var(--core-ui-shadow-lg);
position: fixed; top: 16px; right: 16px; z-index: 9999; max-width: 400px; box-shadow: var(--core-ui-shadow-lg);

p.t-esc: message or 'There is no data to display yet.'
message or 'Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.'
message or 'You do not have permission to access this resource.'

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 2rem;

option.t-att-selected: opt.selected or (opt.value === value) or (opt === value) ? 'selected' : None

t.t-value: 'Rejection' if entry.get('event_type') == 'rejection' else 'Delay' if entry.get('event_type') == 'delay' else 'Event'

div.style: background: var(--core-ui-surface); border: 1px solid var(--core-ui-border); border-radius: var(--core-ui-radius-lg); padding: 1rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; box-shadow: var(--core-ui-shadow-sm); transition: all 0.2s;
display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 0.5rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--core-ui-border-light); font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--core-ui-text-muted);

p.t-esc: description or 'Drag and drop files here or click to browse.'

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem;
position:relative; min-height:320px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:24px; background:var(--core-ui-bg, #f8f9fa); border-radius:8px;

t.t-value: 'Are you sure you want to approve Shipment #PO-2024-0042?'

div.style: position:relative; min-height:260px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:24px; background:var(--core-ui-bg, #f8f9fa); border-radius:8px;
position:relative; min-height:320px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:24px; background:var(--core-ui-bg, #f8f9fa); border-radius:8px;
position:relative; min-height:400px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:24px; background:var(--core-ui-bg, #f8f9fa); border-radius:8px;
display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;
display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;
display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;

t.t-value: [{'label':'Secretarial','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed','notes':'تم إنشاء الطلب'},{'label':'Rejection','icon':'✗','dot_class':'is-event-rejection','line_class':'pending','is_event':True,'event_type':'rejection','user':'AB Request Test User 3','notes':'Reason: werwer'},{'label':'Inventory','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed'},{'label':'Rejection','icon':'✗','dot_class':'is-event-rejection','line_class':'pending','is_event':True,'event_type':'rejection','user':'53-فرع المعادي 2 القاهرة','notes':'Reason: dsf'},{'label':'Purchase','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed'},{'label':'Suppliers','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed'},{'label':'Bank Account','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed'},{'label':'Sign Check','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed'},{'label':'Supplier Notification','icon':'✓','dot_class':'is-completed','line_class':'completed','label_class':'completed','notes':'werwer'},{'label':'Check delivery','icon':'✈','dot_class':'is-overdue','line_class':'pending','label_class':'overdue'}]
'Add your first supplier to get started.'
'Drag and drop your CSV or Excel file.'

div.style: position:relative; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; padding:16px; width:100%; max-width:420px;

div.div: Inventory Updated Stock levels updated successfully.
Low Stock Alert Amoxicillin 250mg is below minimum threshold.
Transfer Failed Insufficient quantity in source warehouse.
